operation.name: write_at_deliver_usb_event
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun action () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun dev_bits () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert
        (and 
             (bvult 
                    (concat 
                            (select 
                                    action
                                    (_ bv7 32)
                            )
                            (concat 
                                    (select 
                                            action
                                            (_ bv6 32)
                                    )
                                    (concat 
                                            (select 
                                                    action
                                                    (_ bv5 32)
                                            )
                                            (concat 
                                                    (select 
                                                            action
                                                            (_ bv4 32)
                                                    )
                                                    (concat 
                                                            (select 
                                                                    action
                                                                    (_ bv3 32)
                                                            )
                                                            (concat 
                                                                    (select 
                                                                            action
                                                                            (_ bv2 32)
                                                                    )
                                                                    (concat 
                                                                            (select 
                                                                                    action
                                                                                    (_ bv1 32)
                                                                            )
                                                                            (select 
                                                                                    action
                                                                                    (_ bv0 32)
                                                                            )
                                                                    )
                                                            )
                                                    )
                                            )
                                    )
                            )
                    )
                    (_ bv4294967296 64)
             )
             (= 
                (_ bv0 64)
                (concat 
                        (select 
                                dev_bits
                                (_ bv7 32)
                        )
                        (concat 
                                (select 
                                        dev_bits
                                        (_ bv6 32)
                                )
                                (concat 
                                        (select 
                                                dev_bits
                                                (_ bv5 32)
                                        )
                                        (concat 
                                                (select 
                                                        dev_bits
                                                        (_ bv4 32)
                                                )
                                                (concat 
                                                        (select 
                                                                dev_bits
                                                                (_ bv3 32)
                                                        )
                                                        (concat 
                                                                (select 
                                                                        dev_bits
                                                                        (_ bv2 32)
                                                                )
                                                                (concat 
                                                                        (select 
                                                                                dev_bits
                                                                                (_ bv1 32)
                                                                        )
                                                                        (select 
                                                                                dev_bits
                                                                                (_ bv0 32)
                                                                        )
                                                                )
                                                        )
                                                )
                                        )
                                )
                        )
                )
             )
        )
)
(check-sat)
(exit)

metadata.bug_type: CWE-787 (OOB_WRITE): Array index write where index is a length-like value (off-by-one / past-last-byte)
